Jessica Birky
PhD Candidate & NSF Fellow
Department of Astronomy, University of Washington
jbirky(at)uw.edu
About Me

I'm a PhD candidate UW interested in computational astrophysics, data science, and open source code. I work on finding novel ways to use large-scale surveys, probabilistic inference, and machine learning to understand the fundamental properties of stars.

Curriculum Vitae
